creative_brief: Clean, single-column layout with warm off-white background. Rachel's signature at close. No hero image needed, let the copy breathe. One CTA button: 'Reserve my VIP spot for $5'.
subject: You're on the list, {first_name}. Here's the honest version.
preheader: No ongoing commitment. No delivery. Just food that goes straight from farm to hub.
body:
Hi {first_name},

Remember why you signed up?

Not for another meal kit. Not for a loyalty card. Because something about the way grocery works felt broken, and this felt different.

It is different. Here's what FarmThru actually is.

We partner directly with regenerative farms. You order online, then collect from your nearest hub in Brookvale, Monday to Friday. No middlemen marking up the margin. No cold chain stretching 2,400km across the country.

Straight from farm to hub.

That's it. That's the whole model. And because we cut the supply chain, farmers get paid more and you pay less than you'd expect for food this good.

No commitment. Order when you want. Collect when it suits you.

Now here's something most people on this list don't know yet.

FarmThru is opening a community funding round on 23 June. And right now, for a small refundable deposit, you can lock a VIP spot and see the offer 24 hours before the public.

If you want to be a partner in the grocery store that pays farmers first, that's how you get there first.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
user_review_note: We need to remove anything about investing dollar amounts. No minimum investment, no maximum. We can say that we are going to do a raise, but not those parts. Also, must as the CSF warning. "Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing."
